skill.name: youtube-summarizer
skill.description: Extract transcripts from YouTube videos and generate comprehensive, detailed summaries using intelligent analysis frameworks
skill.summary: Extract YouTube video transcripts and generate detailed summaries using STAR + R-I-S-E framework
skill.author: Eric Andrade

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 171 potential security issues, but after contextual review, all findings are false positives. The detected patterns are: (1) bash code examples in markdown documentation for installation/usage instructions, not executable code; (2) legitimate YouTube URLs and API library references in documentation; (3) text output mentioning 'sudo' in echo statements, not actual privilege escalation; (4) standard filesystem paths (~/.copilot, ~/.claude, /tmp) for skill installation and temporary file storage. The skill is a legitimate YouTube summarization tool that uses youtube-transcript-api to extract transcripts and generates summaries using AI. No malicious intent, data exfiltration, or security threats detected.

content.user_title: Summarize YouTube Videos with Detailed Transcripts
content.value_statement: Extract full transcripts from YouTube videos and generate comprehensive summaries using the STAR + R-I-S-E framework. Save hours of rewatching by getting detailed, structured documentation that captures all key insights, examples, and terminology from educational content.
actual_capabilities: Extract complete transcripts from YouTube videos using youtube-transcript-api Python library
Validate YouTube URLs and check video/transcript availability before processing
Generate comprehensive summaries using STAR + R-I-S-E framework (Situation, Task, Action, Result + Research, Insights, Synthesis, Execution)
Support multiple transcript languages with automatic fallback to English
Display real-time progress tracking across 5 processing steps with visual progress bars
Save output in flexible formats: summary-only, summary with transcript, or transcript-only
limitations: Only works with public YouTube videos that have auto-generated captions or manual subtitles enabled
Cannot extract transcripts from private, unlisted, or age-restricted videos that require authentication
Requires Python 3.x and pip package manager to install youtube-transcript-api dependency
Summarization quality depends on the accuracy and completeness of the available YouTube transcript
Long videos (60+ minutes) may take 2-5 minutes to process depending on transcript length

use_cases.title: Document Educational Lectures
use_cases.description: Students and researchers can extract detailed summaries from lecture videos, capturing all key concepts, examples, and terminology without rewatching hours of content.

use_cases.title: Analyze Technical Tutorials
use_cases.description: Developers can extract code snippets, commands, best practices, and troubleshooting tips from programming tutorials for quick reference during development work.

use_cases.title: Review Conference Presentations
use_cases.description: Professionals can document insights, statistics, case studies, and arguments from conference talks and presentations for knowledge sharing and team discussions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Summary
prompt_templates.scenario: Get a comprehensive summary of any YouTube video with transcript available

prompt_templates.title: Extract Transcript Only
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract the transcript from this YouTube video: https://youtu.be/VIDEO_ID
prompt_templates.scenario: Get the raw transcript text without summarization for further analysis

prompt_templates.title: Multi-language Video Summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Summarize this YouTube video in Portuguese: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID
prompt_templates.scenario: Request summary in specific language when video has multi-language transcript support

prompt_templates.title: Save Summary to File
prompt_templates.prompt: Summarize this video and save the summary and transcript to a file: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate summary and automatically save both summary and raw transcript to markdown file

best_practices: Always provide complete, valid YouTube URLs including the https:// prefix and video ID parameter for reliable URL parsing
Test with short videos (5-10 minutes) first to verify the youtube-transcript-api dependency is installed correctly before processing longer content
Use the transcript-only save option when you need raw text for further analysis or want to create custom summaries with other tools
anti_patterns: Don't use this skill with private, unlisted, or age-restricted videos as they require authentication and will fail with transcript errors
Don't expect summaries from music videos or entertainment content that typically lack auto-generated captions or manual subtitles
Don't interrupt the processing workflow once started, as the skill extracts transcripts progressively and stopping mid-process will lose progress

faq.question: What types of YouTube videos work with this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with public YouTube videos that have auto-generated captions or manual subtitles enabled. It does not work with private videos, unlisted videos, age-restricted content, or videos without any transcript availability.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything before using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need Python 3.x and the youtube-transcript-api library. The skill will automatically detect if the dependency is missing and offer to install it for you using pip.

faq.question: How long does it take to generate a summary?
faq.answer: Processing time depends on video length and transcript size. Short videos (5-10 minutes) take 30-60 seconds, medium videos (20-40 minutes) take 1-2 minutes, and long videos (60+ minutes) may take 2-5 minutes to process completely.

faq.question: Can I save the summary and transcript to a file?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill offers three save options: summary-only (markdown file), summary with transcript appended (markdown file), or transcript-only (plain text file). You can also choose to display the output without saving any files.

faq.question: What languages are supported for transcript extraction?
faq.answer: The skill attempts to extract transcripts in the video's original language. It prefers Portuguese first, then falls back to English if those are unavailable. For other languages, it will use whatever transcript is available on the video.

faq.question: Does this skill download the actual video file?
faq.answer: No, the skill only extracts the text transcript using YouTube's transcript API through the youtube-transcript-api library. No video or audio files are downloaded to your system.
